name: GPT 5.6 Luna
description: GPT 5.6 Luna is OpenAI's fast and affordable GPT-5.6 model for lower-latency and cost-sensitive workloads.

details.name: availability
details.value: Available via the OpenAI Responses API and client SDKs.

details.name: prompt_caching
details.value: Supports automatic and explicit prompt caching; cache writes are billed at 1.25x uncached input and cache reads remain discounted.

details.name: reasoning_effort
details.value: Supports none, low, medium, high, xhigh, and max reasoning effort.

details.name: pro_mode
details.value: Supports pro mode with reasoning.mode set to pro in the Responses API.

details.name: multi_agent
details.value: Supports the beta multi-agent feature in the Responses API.
